content: Self-Refine’s iterative, task-focused output polishing and Reflexion’s dynamic long-term memory self-reflection can be combined to form a tiered autonomous self-improvement system for LLMs: Self-Refine handles immediate, task-specific refinement of single outputs without extra training, while Reflexion accumulates pattern-level feedback from past Self-Refine cycles to improve the model’s general performance on entire task categories over time. This creates a layered self-improvement loop that mirrors how humans refine immediate work and adjust long-term habits through separate reflection routines.
